channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip, 26th April
item.description:
Outside 94/96 Eugenia Road. Plesss clear flytip from Pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eugenia Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black graffiti on wall behind bike rack, 26th April
item.description:
Black spray paint Zoose $v and a squiggly arrow. This is new.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Knee Hill, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush overgrowing, 26th April
item.description:
There is a bush on the corner of Gresham Close that is overgrown and is causing issues for pedestrians to walk on the path, especially those with pushchairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gresham Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Under railway bridge new Kent Road Elephant and Castle, 26th April
item.description:
Someone has graffiti under the railway bridge New Kent Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 26th April
item.description:
Fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Derby Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle on residential street, 26th April
item.description:
A vehicle has been left parked on the street and appears to be abandoned. It has not moved for a significant period of time and is taking up a parking space in a residential area. The condition of the vehicle suggests it may not be in regular use. This has been an issue for some time and is affecting parking availability for residents. Please could this be investigated and appropriate action taken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clive Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrowing leaves and branches at base of tree blocking access around pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Overgrowing leaves and branches at base of tree blocking access around pavement and having to go around it towards the zebra crossing on the junction of Barry Road and Goodrich Road. Please cut back and make safe please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the top of Anerley Hill about 5m from the jct with Church Rd is an expired event plastic board ad cable tied to a lamp column., 26th April
item.description:
At the top of Anerley Hill about 5m from the jct with Church Rd is an expired event plastic board ad cable tied to a lamp column. Reported from memory and moving vehicle - I think this is the location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side wall of 118, Beckenham Rd, Beckenham (A3arc architects' office) facing the ramp entrance to Beckenham Rd Tram Stop - Spray paint outline tag about 2 sqm on red brick wall., 26th April
item.description:
Side wall of 118, Beckenham Rd, Beckenham (A3arc architects' office) facing the ramp entrance to Beckenham Rd Tram Stop - Spray paint outline tag about 2 sqm on red brick wall. Visible from the public footway.

item.title: Lots of pot holes across Main Road, 25th April
item.description:
Terrible road conditions. All across the main road. Busy road near the fire station/church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Lamp not working, 25th April
item.description:
The lamp outside 9 & 11 Hollingworth Eoad is not working again. There is clearly something wrong with it as it was previously reported and then suddenly started working again when someone came to check it. The same thing happened about a year ago and it took over 3 visits to get it resolved. Please don’t mark the issue as ‘no fault found’ as this lampkis NOT working correctly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingworth Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 25th April
item.description:
Fly tipped bed frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Willow Way, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
